name: Genco
description_short: GENCO Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving McLennan and Angelina counties in Texas, offering checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and credit cards with competitive rates.
description_long:
GENCO Federal Credit Union operates as a federally chartered credit union providing comprehensive financial services to eligible members in McLennan and Angelina counties, Texas. The institution emphasizes member ownership and community focus, distinguishing itself from traditional banks through its cooperative structure and member-centric approach to financial services.

The credit union offers a broad range of consumer and mortgage products including checking and savings accounts (including KASASA cash accounts earning up to 4.25% APY), personal loans, home equity lines of credit, auto loans with pre-approval through their Member Auto Center, mortgage financing, and credit cards including a new Platinum Rewards Mastercard. They also provide certificates of deposit and partner with TruStage for insurance products including life, home, and auto coverage.

GENCO distinguishes itself through specific rate offerings (4.25% APY on Kasasa Cash checking with nationwide ATM fee reimbursement), a dedicated Member Auto Center for vehicle shopping and financing, 24/7 mobile banking and online access, and a personalized approach enabled by geographic membership restrictions. Their emphasis on technology includes a mobile app, online account opening, and web-based payment centers alongside traditional branch service.

As a credit union, GENCO operates on member benefit principles rather than profit maximization, though membership eligibility is limited to those who live or work in specific Texas counties. The institution appears well-established with competitive rates and comprehensive services, though their geographic restriction significantly limits accessibility compared to national banks. Limited information is publicly available regarding customer satisfaction, complaint resolution, or detailed fee structures.
services: Kasasa Cash checking accounts with tiered APY (up to 4.25%)
Free and senior checking account options
Savings accounts and certificates of deposit
Auto loans with pre-approval through Member Auto Center
TruStage insurance products (life, home, auto, accidental death)
Member Auto Center vehicle search and financing coordination
pros: Kasasa Cash checking account earns 4.25% APY with nationwide ATM fee reimbursement
Dedicated Member Auto Center for pre-approval, vehicle valuation, and buying advice
24/7 mobile app and online banking access with account history, transfers, and alerts
Member-owned credit union structure prioritizing member benefits over profits
Comprehensive product suite including checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and credit cards in one institution
New Platinum Rewards Mastercard with specified features and benefits
Online membership application and mortgage pre-qualification available
cons: Membership restricted to those who live or work in McLennan or Angelina counties, Texas only
Limited publicly available information about fee structures, complaint resolution, or member reviews
Geographic service limitation means no physical branches or ATM access outside specific Texas counties
Website content is marketing-focused with minimal details on specific terms, rates, or loan approval criteria
best_for: Texas residents in McLennan or Angelina counties seeking competitive savings rates and comprehensive banking services
Auto buyers in their service area wanting pre-approval and vehicle research support
Homebuyers seeking mortgage financing with online pre-qualification and streamlined application
Members prioritizing locally-focused financial institutions over national bank chains
diagnosis: GENCO is best for current or prospective residents in McLennan or Angelina counties, Texas seeking a member-owned alternative to national banks with competitive deposit rates and a comprehensive product suite. The primary limitation is strict geographic membership eligibility, making this institution inaccessible to consumers outside the two-county service area.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: Genco — NCUA-insured credit union in Waco, TX. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
